entryPoint.note: Canonical EIP-4337 EntryPoint v0.7 (not deployed by us)

IdentityRegistry.note: Canonical ERC-8004 IdentityRegistry on Base Sepolia

MockKeystoneForwarder.note: Simulates Chainlink KeystoneForwarder for testing — calls onReport() directly

RealKeystoneForwarder.note: Canonical Chainlink KeystoneForwarder on Base Sepolia — used by CRE --broadcast

AgentPaymaster.note: EIP-4337 gas sponsor — 0.01 ETH staked, 0.05 ETH deposited

AuctionRegistry.note: Auction lifecycle: OPEN → CLOSED → SETTLED/CANCELLED (EIP-712 sequencer sigs). V4 — bound to the ERC165-compatible CRE settlement stack.

AuctionEscrow.note: USDC bond escrow + CRE settlement via IReceiver.onReport(). V4 — implements ERC165 for KeystoneForwarder compatibility.

NftEscrow.note: NFT custody escrow bound to AuctionRegistry v4.

AgentPrivacyRegistry.note: ZK privacy commitment sidecar — stores registration commitments and Merkle root for membership proofs. NOT identity authority.

AgentAccount (demo).note: First AgentAccount deployed via UserOp (salt=0, runtimeSigner=deployer). Lazy-deployed through Pimlico bundler.

bundler.note: EIP-4337 bundler for UserOp submission. Get API key at dashboard.pimlico.io
